Name: GCP Monitor
Description: Show CPU and RAM of a Google Cloud (GCE) VM on a key. Alerts when the machine is down or has no data in the last minutes.

Actions.Name: VM CPU / RAM
Actions.Tooltip: Monitor CPU and RAM of a GCP Compute Engine instance

Localization.Leave empty to auto-detect gcloud. RAM (: Leave empty to auto-detect gcloud. RAM (%) needs the Ops Agent installed on the VM.
